hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容；【FINANCE】如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么；【WORLD】由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班。

items.title: Here's what to expect from Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's Senate hearing Tuesday
items.summary: In a much-anticipated hearing before the Banking Committee, the former Fed governor will face questioning over a variety of subjects
items.title_zh: 以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容
items.summary_zh: 在银行委员会备受期待的听证会上，前美联储理事将面临各种问题的质询

items.title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
items.summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
items.title_zh: 如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么
items.summary_zh: 在极端波动期间，交易所交易基金行业的创新可能会让投资者付出代价。

items.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
items.summary: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.title_zh: 由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班
items.summary_zh: 由于美以与伊朗的战争导致航空燃油价格飙升，该航空公司是最新一家削减航班的航空公司。

items.title: Kalshi flags more insider trading cases, including politician who appeared on FBoy Island
items.summary: The prediction market platform, which has been caught in the middle of a regulatory battle between the feds and the states, is seeking to demonstrate strong controls.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 标记了更多内幕交易案件，其中包括出现在 FBoy 岛上的政客
items.summary_zh: 该预测市场平台陷入了联邦政府和各州之间的监管斗争，正在寻求展示强有力的控制措施。

items.title: Banks seek to slow down implementation of crypto's GENIUS Act on stablecoin oversight
items.summary: U.S. banking groups argued that a number of federal agencies are moving quickly on stablecoin regulations, making it hard to understand how rules will interact.
items.title_zh: 银行寻求放慢加密货币《稳定币监管天才法案》的实施
items.summary_zh: 美国银行集团认为，许多联邦机构正在迅速制定稳定币监管规定，这使得人们很难理解规则将如何相互作用。

items.title: Crypto bill nears stablecoin rewards breakthrough as talks hit ‘good spot,’ but ethics concerns set to resurface
items.summary: After months of negotiations over how a crypto bill should treat stablecoin rewards, a key negotiator says discussions are in a "good spot."
items.title_zh: 随着谈判达到“良好状态”，加密货币法案接近稳定币奖励突破，但道德担忧将重新浮出水面
items.summary_zh: 经过数月关于加密货币法案应如何对待稳定币奖励的谈判后，一位关键谈判代表表示讨论处于“良好状态”。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
items.title_zh: 引入 GPT-Rosalind 用于生命科学研究
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 GPT-Rosalind，这是一种前沿推理模型，旨在加速药物发现、基因组分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流程。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Reported Seizure of Ships Injects New Uncertainty Over Peace Talks
items.summary: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they had seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. A Trump spokeswoman said the president did not view those actions as violating the cease-fire.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：据报道船只被扣押给和平谈判注入了新的不确定性
items.summary_zh: 伊朗革命卫队表示，他们在霍尔木兹海峡附近扣押了两艘船只。特朗普发言人表示，总统并不认为这些行动违反了停火协议。

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: Protecting the people building DeFi infrastructure
items.summary: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Jennifer Rosenthal writes on the need to protect the people actually building DeFi infrastructure. Then, Alexis Sirkia comments on how Ethereum's L2 strategy is failing due to a fundamental design flaw.
items.title_zh: 加密多空：保护构建 DeFi 基础设施的人们
items.summary_zh: 在本周的加密多空时事通讯中，Jennifer Rosenthal 写道，需要保护实际构建 DeFi 基础设施的人们。然后，Alexis Sirkia 评论了以太坊的 L2 策略如何因基本设计缺陷而失败。

items.title: Bitcoin breaks Strategy's STRC ex-dividend date slump for the first time in six months
items.summary: Bitcoin is seeing a short squeeze dynamic and steady U.S. demand to support gains.
items.title_zh: 比特币六个月来首次突破Strategy的STRC除息日暴跌
items.summary_zh: 比特币面临轧空动态和稳定的美国需求来支撑上涨。

items.title: Bitcoin tops $79,000 as crypto rally gathers steam; Circle, Coinbase, Strategy lead
items.summary: BTC pushed to an 11-week high with dynamics for a short squeeze building, one analyst noted.
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币上涨势头增强，比特币突破 79,000 美元； Circle，Coinbase，战略主管
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师指出，由于空头挤压的动力不断增强，BTC 升至 11 周高点。

items.title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
items.summary: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.
items.title_zh: 将 Codex 扩展到全球企业
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Codex 实验室，与 Accenture、PwC、Infosys 等合作，帮助企业在整个软件开发生命周期中部署和扩展 Codex，并达到 4M Codex WAU。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.title_zh: （几乎）所有内容的法典
items.summary_zh: 适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的更新后的 Codex 应用程序增加了计算机使用、应用程序内浏览、图像生成、内存和插件，以加速开发人员工作流程。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
items.summary: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.
items.title_zh: 贝森特表示，在伊朗战争动荡期间，“许多”美国盟友已要求进行货币互换
items.summary_zh: 白宫周二表示，阿联酋没有要求货币互换额度。

items.title: Trump administration discussing currency swap line with United Arab Emirates
items.summary: Such a move would provide liquidity in dollars to the oil-rich UAE, but could be politically tenuous for the administration amid higher prices at home.
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府与阿拉伯联合酋长国讨论货币互换额度
items.summary_zh: 此举将为石油资源丰富的阿联酋提供美元流动性，但由于国内油价上涨，对政府来说可能在政治上脆弱。

items.title: JPMorgan expands $1.5 trillion economic security splurge into Europe
items.summary: The banking giant is looking to invest in areas deemed critical to economic security, including defense and AI.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通将 1.5 万亿美元的经济安全投资扩大到欧洲
items.summary_zh: 这家银行巨头正在寻求投资对经济安全至关重要的领域，包括国防和人工智能。

items.title: Software stock dogs have joined market rally. There's a classic investing lesson in the rebound
items.summary: In a 2026 market that had Microsoft down close to 20%, looking for opportunities to buy after big drawdowns is coming to more tech and software stocks.
items.title_zh: 软件股也加入了市场上涨行列。反弹中有一个经典的投资教训
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的市场中，微软股价下跌了近 20%，更多科技和软件股票在大幅下跌后寻找买入机会。

items.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
items.summary: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦推动谈判，美国和伊朗陷入封锁僵局
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普延长了停火期限，霍尔木兹海峡的情绪仍然不稳定。

items.title: To Iran, Trump Blinked First by Extending the Cease-Fire
items.summary: Iran’s leaders believe that they can withstand an enduring standoff longer than President Trump. The strategy could be economically devastating for average Iranians.
items.title_zh: 对伊朗，特朗普首先眨眼延长停火
items.summary_zh: 伊朗领导人相信，他们能够比特朗普总统更长久地承受持久的对峙。该战略可能对普通伊朗人造成经济上的毁灭性打击。

items.title: EU Considers $106 Billion Loan to Ukraine, Delayed for Months by Orban
items.summary: After months of impasse because of objections from Hungary’s prime minister, Viktor Orban, E.U. ambassadors took a critical step on the way to disbursing the much-needed money.
items.title_zh: 欧盟考虑向乌克兰提供 1060 亿美元贷款，但欧尔班推迟了数月
items.summary_zh: 由于匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班 (Viktor Orban) 的反对，欧盟陷入了数月的僵局。各国大使在发放急需资金的道路上迈出了关键一步。

items.title: Iranian Expats in U.A.E. Caught Between Home and Homeland
items.summary: Iran’s retaliatory attacks on the United Arab Emirates have put the U.A.E.’s large Iranian expatriate community in an uncomfortable position.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋的伊朗侨民夹在家乡和祖国之间
items.summary_zh: 伊朗对阿拉伯联合酋长国的报复性袭击使阿联酋庞大的伊朗侨民社区陷入了尴尬的境地。

items.title: Pilot Was Taking Pictures Before South Korean Fighter Jets Collided
items.summary: A member of the other plane’s crew was making a video to commemorate the mission, the government said in a report on the 2021 crash. No one was hurt.
items.title_zh: 韩国战斗机相撞前飞行员正在拍照
items.summary_zh: 政府在一份关于 2021 年坠机事件的报告中表示，另一架飞机的一名机组人员正在制作一段视频来纪念这次任务。没有人受伤。

items.title: The Protocol: Kelp DAO exploited for $292 million
items.summary: Also: DPRK hacking crypto, Aave contagion and Coinbase on quantum computing.
items.title_zh: 协议：Kelp DAO 被利用价值 2.92 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 另外：朝鲜黑客攻击加密货币、Aave 传染和量子计算方面的 Coinbase。

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried withdraws new trial motion for now, says he won’t get ‘fair hearing’ from judge
items.summary: SBF withdrew his motion for a new trial for now in a letter to Judge Lewis Kaplan, adding that he didn't think he would get a "fair hearing."
items.title_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德暂时撤回新的审判动议，称他不会得到法官的“公平听证会”
items.summary_zh: SBF 在给刘易斯·卡普兰法官的一封信中暂时撤回了重新审判的动议，并补充说他认为自己不会得到“公平的听证会”。

items.title: New York Governor Hochul targets prediction markets amid growing concerns of insider betting
items.summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul signed an executive order banning state employees from using insider information to bet on prediction markets.
items.title_zh: 纽约州州长 Hochul 在对内幕博彩的担忧日益加剧之际瞄准了预测市场
items.summary_zh: 纽约州州长凯西·霍赫尔（Kathy Hochul）签署了一项行政命令，禁止州政府雇员利用内幕信息押注预测市场。

items.title: Input Output proposes scaled-back Cardano treasury plan ahead of Leios mainnet push
items.summary: The Leios mainnet launch is at the center of the roadmap, but IO’s tracker shows the upgrade still mid-development.
items.title_zh: 输入输出提议在Leios主网推出之前缩减卡尔达诺财务计划
items.summary_zh: Leios 主网的发布是路线图的中心，但 IO 的跟踪器显示升级仍处于开发中期。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Elon Musk's Tesla reports unchanged bitcoin holdings, books $173 million digital asset loss
items.summary: The company's bitcoin stash remained at 11,509 BTC, worth about $880 million at bitcoin's current price of around $78,000.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的特斯拉报告比特币持有量未发生变化，数字资产损失达 1.73 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司的比特币储备仍为 11,509 BTC，按比特币目前约 78,000 美元的价格计算，价值约 8.8 亿美元。

items.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin shares spike over 12% after announcing more mining power
items.summary: The Trump family-linked mining and treasury company announced 11,298 additional bitcoin mining ASICs at its Drumheller site.
items.title_zh: 宣布增加挖矿能力后，与特朗普相关的美国比特币股价飙升超过 12%
items.summary_zh: 这家与特朗普家族有关联的矿业和财务公司宣布在其 Drumheller 站点新增 11,298 个比特币挖矿 ASIC。

items.title: Eric Trump’s American Bitcoin rises 12% amid increase in BTC mining capacity
items.summary: American Bitcoin said that it completed the "energization of ~11,298 Bitcoin miners at its Drumheller site.
items.title_zh: 埃里克·特朗普(Eric Trump)的美国比特币因BTC挖矿能力增加而上涨12%
items.summary_zh: American Bitcoin 表示，它已完成“其 Drumheller 站点约 11,298 名比特币矿工的通电”。

items.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
items.summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
items.title_zh: 让 ChatGPT 更好地为临床医生服务
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为经过验证的美国医生、执业护士和药剂师免费提供 ChatGPT for Clinicians，支持临床护理、文档记录和研究。

items.title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
items.summary: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
items.title_zh: 使用响应 API 中的 WebSocket 加速代理工作流程
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨 Codex 代理循环，展示 WebSocket 和连接范围的缓存如何减少 API 开销并改善模型延迟。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
items.summary: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy
items.title_zh: OpenAI 隐私过滤器简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Privacy Filter 是一种开放权重模型，用于以最先进的精度检测和编辑文本中的个人身份信息 (PII)

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
items.summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 图像 2.0 简介
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT Images 2.0 引入了最先进的图像生成模型，具有改进的文本渲染、多语言支持和高级视觉推理。

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子转换器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Volkswagen announces voice AI in its Chinese cars from later this year
items.summary: Volkswagen revealed four cars, including the ID. UNYX 09, which the company said it co-developed with EV maker Xpeng in two years.
items.title_zh: 大众汽车宣布今年晚些时候将在其中国汽车中配备语音人工智能
items.summary_zh: 大众汽车发布了四款汽车，其中包括 ID. UNYX 09，该公司表示，该产品是与电动汽车制造商小鹏汽车在两年内共同开发的。

items.title: AST SpaceMobile shares drop after its satellite is placed in wrong orbit by Bezos' Blue Origin
items.summary: Blue Origin acknowledged the satellite was placed in the wrong orbit, but has not commented since it was deemed lost.
items.title_zh: 贝佐斯的蓝色起源将 AST SpaceMobile 的卫星送入错误轨道后，其股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 蓝色起源承认这颗卫星被放置在错误的轨道上，但由于被认为丢失而没有发表评论。

items.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
items.summary: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.
items.title_zh: AI初创公司Cursor正在洽谈融资20亿美元，估值超过500亿美元
items.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司 Cursor 正在洽谈一轮 20 亿美元融资，估值超过 500 亿美元，其中不包括投资。

items.title: Here are 3 forces that drove a remarkable, record-setting week on Wall Street
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed above 7,100 for the first time as it completed its fastest turnaround since 1990.
items.title_zh: 以下三股力量推动了华尔街创下非凡创纪录的一周
items.summary_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数首次收于 7,100 点之上，完成了 1990 年以来最快的反转。

items.title: Billionaire backer sues Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion
items.summary: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.
items.title_zh: 亿万富翁支持者起诉特朗普家族的加密货币公司涉嫌勒索
items.summary_zh: 亿万富翁投资者贾斯汀·孙 (Justin Sun) 在花费 4500 万美元购买其家族的 World Liberty 加密货币公司的代币后，正在起诉该公司。

items.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
items.summary: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥在结束非洲之行时批评赤道几内亚监狱
items.summary_zh: 教宗发表了坦率而热情的讲话，这是他非洲之行的特色。

items.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock
items.summary: Ukraine says it has reopened the Druzhba pipeline, after months of stalemate over stalled oil supplies to neighbouring Hungary.
items.title_zh: 管道开通结束僵局 欧盟批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰表示，在邻国匈牙利的石油供应陷入僵局数月后，该国已重新开放德鲁日巴管道。

items.title: Nigeria's suspected coup plotters deny treason charges
items.summary: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced last year when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚涉嫌政变策划者否认叛国罪指控
items.summary_zh: 去年独立日游行被取消时，有关政变阴谋的指控首次浮出水面。

items.title: No cartels involved - but Mexico's pyramid attack prompts new concerns
items.summary: The deadly shooting at a popular tourist site weeks before the World Cup has rocked Mexico.
items.title_zh: 不涉及卡特尔——但墨西哥的金字塔袭击引发了新的担忧
items.summary_zh: 世界杯前几周，一处热门旅游景点发生致命枪击事件，震惊了墨西哥。

items.title: US charges anti-extremism organisation over payments to informants in hate groups
items.summary: The Southern Poverty Law Center said it would "vigorously defend ourselves, our staff, and our work".
items.title_zh: 美国指控反极端主义组织向仇恨团体的线人支付报酬
items.summary_zh: 南方贫困法律中心表示将“大力捍卫我们自己、我们的员工和我们的工作”。

items.title: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots taking pictures, report finds
items.summary: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.title_zh: 报告发现韩国战斗机因飞行员拍照而相撞
items.summary_zh: 其中一名飞行员被军方罚款数千美元，以支付维修费用。

items.title: Taiwan president cancels trip after African countries revoke flight permits
items.summary: Taiwan has accused Beijing of putting pressure on African countries to close their airspace to Lai's plane.
items.title_zh: 非洲国家吊销飞行许可 台湾总统取消行程
items.summary_zh: 台湾指责北京向非洲国家施压，要求其对黎智英的飞机关闭领空。

items.title: Threat of Evictions Darkens Russia’s Rosy Picture of Occupied Ukraine
items.summary: A new law forces Ukrainians in the captured regions to get Russian title deeds or risk losing their homes.
items.title_zh: 驱逐威胁使俄罗斯对被占领乌克兰的美好前景变得黯淡
items.summary_zh: 一项新法律迫使被占领地区的乌克兰人必须获得俄罗斯所有权契约，否则将面临失去家园的风险。

items.title: Pope Leo Is Skipping Some of Africa’s Biggest Catholic Nations
items.summary: As the pontiff arrives in the tiny authoritarian nation of Equatorial Guinea, some Catholics in Africa say they are excited about his visit but are feeling a little left out.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥将跳过一些非洲最大的天主教国家
items.summary_zh: 当教宗抵达赤道几内亚这个极权小国时，非洲的一些天主教徒表示，他们对他的访问感到兴奋，但感觉有点被忽视。

items.title: A Year After Terrorist Attack, a Kashmir Town Longs for Tourists
items.summary: Pahalgam, with steep ravines, grassy hillsides and pine forests, is a base for Hindu pilgrimages that business operators hope will revive visitors.
items.title_zh: 恐怖袭击一年后，克什米尔小镇渴望游客
items.summary_zh: 帕哈加姆拥有陡峭的峡谷、绿草如茵的山坡和松树林，是印度教朝圣的基地，企业经营者希望这里能重振游客的热情。

items.title: US Withholding Iraq’s Own Oil Money Over Ties to Iran
items.summary: The United States has halted dollar shipments to Iraq’s cash-based economy in an effort to force the Baghdad government to distance itself from Iran. The money comes from Iraq’s oil revenues.
items.title_zh: 美国因与伊朗的关系而扣留伊拉克自己的石油资金
items.summary_zh: 美国已停止向伊拉克以现金为基础的经济运送美元，以迫使巴格达政府与伊朗保持距离。这笔钱来自伊拉克的石油收入。

items.title: Pope Leo, Visiting African Prison, Urges Inmates to Find Hope Amid Despair
items.summary: “Life is not defined solely by one’s mistakes,” the pope told inmates being held in a port city of Equatorial Guinea.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥视察非洲监狱，敦促囚犯在绝望中寻找希望
items.summary_zh: “生命不仅仅由一个人的错误来定义，”教皇告诉被关押在赤道几内亚港口城市的囚犯。

items.title: The question isn't whether privacy. It's what sort of privacy
items.summary: Blockchains are going private. The only question left is what kind of privacy the industry will build, argues Schiller.
items.title_zh: 问题不在于是否隐私。这是什么样的隐私
items.summary_zh: 区块链正在走向私有化。席勒认为，剩下的唯一问题是该行业将建立什么样的隐私。

items.title: The $292 million Kelp DAO exploit shows why crypto bridges are still one of the industry's weakest links
items.summary: The problem is structural and as long as bridges depend on complex systems with shared infrastructure and hidden trust assumptions, they will remain vulnerable.
items.title_zh: 价值 2.92 亿美元的 Kelp DAO 漏洞表明了为什么加密桥仍然是该行业最薄弱的环节之一
items.summary_zh: 问题是结构性的，只要桥梁依赖于具有共享基础设施和隐藏信任假设的复杂系统，它们就仍然容易受到攻击。

items.title: Inside Plasma with Zaheer: The Future of Stablecoins
items.summary: Zaheer explains why stablecoins, better UX, and focused execution are key to crypto’s next phase of adoption.
items.title_zh: Zaheer 深入 Plasma：稳定币的未来
items.summary_zh: Zaheer 解释了为什么稳定币、更好的用户体验和集中执行是加密货币下一阶段采用的关键。

items.title: TD Cowen flags five hurdles to crypto bill beyond stablecoin yield issue
items.summary: These include a lack of CFTC commissioners, conflicts tied to World Liberty Financial, and concerns around Iran's use of crypto payments.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 指出了除稳定币收益率问题之外的加密法案的五个障碍
items.summary_zh: 其中包括缺乏 CFTC 专员、与 World Liberty Financial 相关的冲突以及对伊朗使用加密支付的担忧。

items.title: Kalshi taps Pyth for new ‘Commodities Hub,’ offering gold, oil and lithium markets
items.summary: Pyth aggregates price feeds from over 125 institutions, including exchanges and market makers, to provide 24/7 pricing data.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 利用 Pyth 打造新的“商品中心”，提供黄金、石油和锂市场
items.summary_zh: Pyth 汇总了来自超过 125 个机构（包括交易所和做市商）的价格信息，以提供 24/7 的定价数据。

items.title: UK FCA carries out first crackdown on illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading
items.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority said it has carried out its first operation targeting illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading in the UK.
items.title_zh: 英国FCA首次打击非法点对点加密货币交易
items.summary_zh: 英国金融行为监管局表示，它已针对英国的非法点对点加密货币交易开展了首次行动。

items.title: Binance.US slashes trading fees across listed cryptocurrencies in a bid to attract users
items.summary: “American crypto traders have been paying too much for too long,” Binance.US CEO Stephen Gregory said about the move to slash fees.
items.title_zh: Binance.US大幅削减上市加密货币的交易费用以吸引用户
items.summary_zh: Binance.US 首席执行官斯蒂芬·格雷戈里 (Stephen Gregory) 在谈到削减费用的举措时表示：“美国加密货币交易者长期以来一直支付过高的费用。”

items.title: Workspace agents
items.summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
items.title_zh: 工作区代理
items.summary_zh: 了解如何在 ChatGPT 中构建、使用和扩展工作区代理，以自动化可重复的工作流程、连接工具并简化团队运营。

items.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
items.summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
items.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中引入工作区代理
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 中的工作区代理是由 Codex 支持的代理，可自动执行复杂的工作流程、在云中运行并帮助团队安全地跨工具扩展工作。

items.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
items.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 帮助凯悦在同事中推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 凯悦在其全球员工中部署 ChatGPT Enterprise，使用 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 来提高生产力、运营和宾客体验。

items.title_zh: Jetson Music Nano Super 上的 Gemma 4 VLA 演示

items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式
items.summary_zh: Google 的最新工具可以帮助您计划旅行、找到超值优惠并探索下一个目的地。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
